problem_id: Two-Way Interoperability between the Single Window System and Department Systems
team_name: NexusFlow: Two-Way Interoperability for Smart Governance
summary: Design a layer that propagates service requests both ways between Karnataka's Single Window System and the legacy department systems, using the Unique Business Identifier (UBID) as the common join key. Solution: NexusFlow.
key_steps: Creating a real-time, bidirectional data exchange layer
Automating approvals, status updates, and compliance checks
Providing real-time dashboards and tracking mechanisms
Ensuring data consistency, detecting anomalies, and enhancing operational efficiency
optimization_claims: Reducing manual intervention, redundancy, and delays
